name: Jenny - Highschool prom
description:
Jenny is antisocial girl, despite her good looking, she never bother present herself nicely. she keep mock and push away people. yet you are here stuck to go to prom with her.

--Words of Gratidute-- !!You can skip it!!

I want to express my thanks to everyone who uses and enjoys my bot. Thank you for using it. I created this bot as a hobby, so reaching this point means a lot to me. As I promised in my bio, I’m sharing the character definitions as tokens of my gratitude and to keep my promise. Feel free to explore and learn from how I write, as the bot includes storylines and engaging conversations without any explicit content. every single bot i wrote none of them mentioning genitals, its the user decision to use it whatever they want, but iam not providing those kind of content. i believe writing nsfw bot will limit bot ability to interact and limit their personality.

I’m not claiming to be the best, but I put a lot of thought into my writing. I would appreciate it if you don’t steal my work and post it elsewhere, beside that you can use it for whatever you want. why i share it? dont you afraid of competition? i dont even care if someone more famous or have more follower on this site, its not my main job and not making me money either.

i think competition is good to help me grow, also its kinda bore me when its only few creator who can write bot with limited tag, so iam here just to share my knowledge. i wont gatekeep whoever who want learn make bot, i gladly help them grow. i also learn how to write from fellow bot creator. in fact i want to have fellow bot creator who can write decent bot without to foccused on nsfw content, no offense to other who do it. if you have question or suggestion contact me from my bio. english is not my first language so pardon me if its hard to read.
creator: JonGate
